HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering
 
Loading...
Searching...
No Matches
SIEFormPMCHW.cpp
Go to the documentation of this file.
1
5
6#include "SIEFormPMCHW.h"
7#include <mutex>
8#include <thread>
9
10// ---------------- Constructors ----------------
11// Construct PMCHWT for a homogeneous medium (no layered back-end).
12SIEFormPMCHW::SIEFormPMCHW(std::vector<RWGFun> *inRWGFuns, GreenF *inGrnFun,
13 std::vector<IncidentField *> *inIncFields,
14 dcmplx inVacWavelength, dcmplx inEpsilon,
15 dcmplx inMu)
16 : SIEForm(inRWGFuns, inGrnFun, inIncFields, inVacWavelength),
17 epsilon(inEpsilon),
18 mu(inMu) { grnFunLayered = nullptr; }
19
20
21// Construct PMCHWT for a layered medium (requires layered Green's).
22SIEFormPMCHW::SIEFormPMCHW(std::vector<RWGFun> *inRWGFuns,
23 GreenF *inGrnFun,
24 std::vector<IncidentField *> *inIncFields,
25 dcmplx inVacWavelength,
26 GreenF *inGrnFunLayered,
27 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inEpsilon,
28 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inMu,
29 const std::vector<double>& inZVals,
30 int inMidLayerIndex)
31 : SIEForm(inRWGFuns, inGrnFun, inIncFields, inVacWavelength),
32 epsilonLayered(inEpsilon),
33 muLayered(inMu),
34 zValsInterfaces(inZVals),
35 grnFunLayered(inGrnFunLayered),
36 midLayerIndex(inMidLayerIndex) {}
37
38// ---------------- Medium helpers -----------------
39// Homogeneous wave impedance Zr = sqrt(mu/epsilon).
40dcmplx SIEFormPMCHW::Zr(dcmplx e, dcmplx m) { return sqrt(m / e); }
41
42// Layer-wise impedances Zr_l = sqrt(μ_l/ε_l) with safe length.
43std::vector<dcmplx> SIEFormPMCHW::ZrLayered(const std::vector<dcmplx>& e,
44 const std::vector<dcmplx>& m) {
45 // Ensure both vectors have the same size
46 size_t size = std::min(e.size(), m.size());
47 std::vector<dcmplx> Zr_values(size);
48 for (size_t i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
49 Zr_values[i] = csqrt(m[i] / e[i]); // Zr = sqrt(mu / epsilon)
50 }
51 return Zr_values;
52}
53
54// ---------------- Matrix assembly ----------------
60int SIEFormPMCHW::FillLSEMatrix(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> *lseMatrix) {
61 using std::vector;
62 using std::pair;
63 vector<RWGFun>::iterator rwgM, rwgN;
64
65 // Partition the RWG functions to groups over same triangle
66 vector<vector<RWGFun *>> rwgPerTri;
67 for (rwgM = rwgFuns->begin(); rwgM != rwgFuns->end();) {
68 rwgPerTri.push_back(vector<RWGFun *>());
69 for (rwgN = rwgM;
70 rwgN != rwgFuns->end() and rwgN->TrianglePtr() == rwgM->TrianglePtr();
71 rwgN++) {
72 rwgPerTri.back().push_back(&(*rwgN));
73 }
74 rwgM = rwgN;
75 }
76
77#ifdef DEBUG
78 for (int i = 0; i < rwgTriLen; ++i) {
79 std::cout << "Group " << i << " : size " << rwgPerTri[i].size() << "\n";
80 }
81#endif
82
83 std::cout << "Filling matrix with " << rwgFuns->size() << " elements."
84 << std::endl;
85
86 int mxOffset(lseMatrix->shape()(0) / 2);
87 std::mutex *mut = new std::mutex[mxOffset + 1];
88 std::thread *th = new std::thread[threads - 1];
89 int index = 0;
90 for (int i = 0; i < threads - 1; ++i) {
91 th[i] = std::thread(&SIEFormPMCHW::FillLSEMatrixParallel, this, lseMatrix,
92 std::ref(rwgPerTri), std::ref(index), mut);
93 }
94 FillLSEMatrixParallel(lseMatrix, rwgPerTri, index, mut);
95 for (int i = 0; i < threads - 1; ++i) {
96 th[i].join();
97 }
98 delete[] th;
99 delete[] mut;
100
101 std::cout << std::endl;
102#ifdef DEBUG
103 for (int i = 0; i < 2 * mxOffset; ++i) {
104 for (int j = 0; j < 2 * mxOffset; ++j) {
105 std::cout << "M(" << i << "," << j << ") = " << std::setprecision(16)
106 << (*lseMatrix)(i, j) << "\n";
107 }
108 std::cout << "\n";
109 }
110#endif
111 return 0;
112}
113
114// Worker: fill blocks for one triangle-group i against all j.
115int SIEFormPMCHW::FillLSEMatrixParallel(
116 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> *lseMatrix,
117 const std::vector<std::vector<RWGFun *>> &rwgPerTri, int &index,
118 std::mutex *mut) {
119 using std::vector;
120 using std::pair;
121 int mxOffset(lseMatrix->shape()(0) / 2);
122 while (1) {
123 int i;
124 {
125 // Important : do not remove braces, they are there to block-scope mutex
126 // lock
127 std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mut[mxOffset]);
128 i = index;
129 if (i >= rwgPerTri.size()) break;
130 ++index;
131 }
132 std::cout << ".";
133 std::cout.flush();
134 const auto &trii = rwgPerTri[i];
135 if (grnFunLayered == nullptr) // Homogeneous medium
136 {
137 dcmplx factor1 = I * omega * MU0 * mu;
138 dcmplx factor2 = -I * omega * EPS0 * epsilon;
139 for (const auto &trij : rwgPerTri) {
140 vector<vector<pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>> DK(
141 trii.size(), vector<pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>(
142 trij.size(), make_pair(dcmplx(0), dcmplx(0))));
143 grnFun->SameTriDK(trii, trij, DK);
144
145 for (int k = 0; k < (int)rwgPerTri[i].size(); ++k) {
146 int m(trii[k]->EdgeIndex());
147 std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mut[m]);
148 for (int l = 0; l < (int)trij.size(); ++l) {
149 int n(trij[l]->EdgeIndex());
150 (*lseMatrix)(m, n) += factor1 * DK[k][l].first;
151 (*lseMatrix)(m, n + mxOffset) += DK[k][l].second;
152 (*lseMatrix)(m + mxOffset, n) += DK[k][l].second;
153 (*lseMatrix)(m + mxOffset, n + mxOffset) += factor2 * DK[k][l].first;
154 }
155 }
156 }
157 } else { // Layered medium
158#ifdef DEBUG
159 vector<vector<pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>> DK_test(
160 trii.size(), vector<pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>(
161 rwgPerTri[0].size(), make_pair(dcmplx(0), dcmplx(0))));
162 grnFunLayered->SameTriDK(trii, rwgPerTri[0], DK_test);
163#endif
164 for (const auto &trij : rwgPerTri) {
165 vector<vector<pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>> DK_hom(
166 trii.size(), vector<pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>(
167 trij.size(), make_pair(dcmplx(0.0), dcmplx(0.0))));
168
169 vector<vector<pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>> DK_E(
170 trii.size(), vector<pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>(
171 trij.size(), make_pair(dcmplx(0.0), dcmplx(0.0))));
172
173 vector<vector<pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>> DK_H(
174 trii.size(), vector<pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>(
175 trij.size(), make_pair(dcmplx(1.0), dcmplx(0.0))));
176
177 rvec iCenter = trii[0]->TrianglePtr()->Center();
178 rvec jCenter = trij[0]->TrianglePtr()->Center();
179 if (GetLayerIndex(iCenter) == GetLayerIndex(jCenter)) {
180 grnFun[GetLayerIndex(iCenter)].SameTriDK(trii, trij, DK_hom);
181 }
182
183 // Calculate the factors based on the layered medium properties
184 dcmplx factor1 = I * omega * MU0 * muLayered[GetLayerIndex(jCenter)];
185 dcmplx factor2 = -I * omega * EPS0 * epsilonLayered[GetLayerIndex(jCenter)];
186
187 // Calculate DK_E and DK_H for the layered medium
188 grnFunLayered->SameTriDK(trii, trij, DK_E);
189 grnFunLayered->SameTriDK(trii, trij, DK_H);
190
191 for (int k = 0; k < (int)rwgPerTri[i].size(); ++k) {
192 int m(trii[k]->EdgeIndex());
193 std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mut[m]);
194 for (int l = 0; l < (int)trij.size(); ++l) {
195 int n(trij[l]->EdgeIndex());
196 (*lseMatrix)(m, n) += factor1 * (DK_hom[k][l].first + DK_E[k][l].first);
197 (*lseMatrix)(m, n + mxOffset) += DK_hom[k][l].second + DK_E[k][l].second;
198 (*lseMatrix)(m + mxOffset, n) += DK_hom[k][l].second + DK_H[k][l].second;
199 (*lseMatrix)(m + mxOffset, n + mxOffset) +=
200 factor2 * (DK_hom[k][l].first + DK_H[k][l].first);
201 }
202 }
203 }
204 }
205 }
206 return 0;
207}
208
209// ---------------- Matrix + gradient (homogeneous) ----------------
215int SIEFormPMCHW::FillLSEMatrixAndGradient(
216 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> *lseMatrix,
217 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> *lseGradientMatrix[3]) {
218 using std::vector;
219 using std::pair;
220 vector<RWGFun>::iterator rwgM, rwgN;
221
222 // Partition the RWG functions to groups over same triangle
223 vector<vector<RWGFun *>> rwgPerTri;
224 // Whether each triangle is between
225 // 1 : 0 and 1
226 // 2 : 0 and some other domain
227 // 0 : any other case
228 vector<int> bordertype;
229 for (rwgM = rwgFuns->begin(); rwgM != rwgFuns->end();) {
230 rwgPerTri.push_back(vector<RWGFun *>());
231 if (std::min(rwgM->TrianglePtr()->BorderingIndeces().first,
232 rwgM->TrianglePtr()->BorderingIndeces().second) == 0) {
233 if (std::max(rwgM->TrianglePtr()->BorderingIndeces().first,
234 rwgM->TrianglePtr()->BorderingIndeces().second) == 1) {
235 bordertype.push_back(1);
236 } else {
237 bordertype.push_back(2);
238 }
239 } else {
240 bordertype.push_back(0);
241 }
242 for (rwgN = rwgM;
243 rwgN != rwgFuns->end() and rwgN->TrianglePtr() == rwgM->TrianglePtr();
244 rwgN++) {
245 rwgPerTri.back().push_back(&(*rwgN));
246 }
247 rwgM = rwgN;
248 }
249
250#ifdef DEBUG
251 for (int i = 0; i < rwgTriLen; ++i) {
252 std::cout << "Group " << i << " : size " << rwgPerTri[i].size() << "\n";
253 }
254#endif
255
256 std::cout << "Filling matrix with " << rwgFuns->size() << " elements."
257 << std::endl;
258
259 int mxOffset(lseMatrix->shape()(0) / 2);
260 std::mutex *mut = new std::mutex[mxOffset + 1];
261 std::thread *th = new std::thread[threads - 1];
262 int index = 0;
263 for (int i = 0; i < threads - 1; ++i) {
264 th[i] = std::thread(&SIEFormPMCHW::FillLSEMatrixAndGradientParallel, this,
265 lseMatrix, lseGradientMatrix, std::ref(rwgPerTri),
266 std::ref(bordertype), std::ref(index), mut);
267 }
268 FillLSEMatrixAndGradientParallel(lseMatrix, lseGradientMatrix, rwgPerTri,
269 bordertype, index, mut);
270 for (int i = 0; i < threads - 1; ++i) {
271 th[i].join();
272 }
273 delete[] th;
274 delete[] mut;
275
276 std::cout << std::endl;
277#ifdef DEBUG
278 for (int i = 0; i < 2 * mxOffset; ++i) {
279 for (int j = 0; j < 2 * mxOffset; ++j) {
280 std::cout << "M(" << i << "," << j << ") = " << (*lseMatrix)(i, j)
281 << "\n";
282 for (int k = 0; k < 3; ++k) {
283 std::cout << "GM" << k << "(" << i << "," << j
284 << ") = " << (*(lseGradientMatrix[k]))(i, j) << "\n";
285 }
286 }
287 std::cout << "\n";
288 }
289#endif
290 return 0;
291}
292
297int SIEFormPMCHW::FillLSEMatrixAndGradientParallel(
298 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> *lseMatrix,
299 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> *lseGradientMatrix[3],
300 const std::vector<std::vector<RWGFun *>> &rwgPerTri,
301 const std::vector<int> &bordertype, int &index, std::mutex *mut) {
302 using std::vector;
303 using std::pair;
304 dcmplx factor1 = I * omega * MU0 * mu;
305 dcmplx factor2 = -I * omega * EPS0 * epsilon;
306 int mxOffset(lseMatrix->shape()(0) / 2);
307 while (1) {
308 int i;
309 {
310 // Important : do not remove braces, they are there to block-scope mutex
311 // lock
312 std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mut[mxOffset]);
313 i = index;
314 if (i >= rwgPerTri.size()) break;
315 ++index;
316 }
317 std::cout << ".";
318 std::cout.flush();
319 const auto &trii = rwgPerTri[i];
320 for (int j = 0; j < rwgPerTri.size(); ++j) {
321 const auto &trij = rwgPerTri[j];
322 // Gradient calculation required only when one triangle is between 0-1 and
323 // the other is between 0-!1
324 if (bordertype[i] + bordertype[j] != 3) {
325 vector<vector<pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>> DK(
326 trii.size(), vector<pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>(
327 trij.size(), make_pair(dcmplx(0), dcmplx(0))));
328 grnFun->SameTriDK(trii, trij, DK);
329
330 for (int k = 0; k < (int)trii.size(); ++k) {
331 int m(trii[k]->EdgeIndex());
332 std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mut[m]);
333 for (int l = 0; l < (int)trij.size(); ++l) {
334 int n(trij[l]->EdgeIndex());
335 (*lseMatrix)(m, n) += factor1 * DK[k][l].first;
336 (*lseMatrix)(m, n + mxOffset) += DK[k][l].second;
337 (*lseMatrix)(m + mxOffset, n) += DK[k][l].second;
338 (*lseMatrix)(m + mxOffset, n + mxOffset) +=
339 factor2 * DK[k][l].first;
340 }
341 }
342 } else {
343 double sgn = (bordertype[i] == 1) ? 1 : -1;
344 vector<vector<pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>> DK(
345 trii.size(), vector<pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>(
346 trij.size(), make_pair(dcmplx(0), dcmplx(0))));
347 vector<vector<pair<cvec, cvec>>> DKG(
348 trii.size(),
349 vector<pair<cvec, cvec>>(trij.size(),
350 make_pair(cvec(0, 0, 0), cvec(0, 0, 0))));
351 grnFun->SameTriDKG(trii, trij, DK, DKG);
352
353 for (int k = 0; k < (int)trii.size(); ++k) {
354 int m(trii[k]->EdgeIndex());
355 std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mut[m]);
356 for (int l = 0; l < (int)trij.size(); ++l) {
357 int n(trij[l]->EdgeIndex());
358 (*lseMatrix)(m, n) += factor1 * DK[k][l].first;
359 (*lseMatrix)(m, n + mxOffset) += DK[k][l].second;
360 (*lseMatrix)(m + mxOffset, n) += DK[k][l].second;
361 (*lseMatrix)(m + mxOffset, n + mxOffset) +=
362 factor2 * DK[k][l].first;
363 for (int p = 0; p < 3; ++p) {
364 (*(lseGradientMatrix[p]))(m, n) +=
365 sgn * factor1 * DKG[k][l].first[p];
366 (*(lseGradientMatrix[p]))(m, n + mxOffset) +=
367 sgn * DKG[k][l].second[p];
368 (*(lseGradientMatrix[p]))(m + mxOffset, n) +=
369 sgn * DKG[k][l].second[p];
370 (*(lseGradientMatrix[p]))(m + mxOffset, n + mxOffset) +=
371 sgn * factor2 * DKG[k][l].first[p];
372 }
373 }
374 }
375 }
376 }
377 }
378 return 0;
379}
380
381// ----------------------- RHS vector -----------------------
386int SIEFormPMCHW::FillLSEVector(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *lseVector) {
387 std::cout << "Filling vector." << std::endl;
388 int mxOffset(lseVector->shape()(0) / 2);
389 for (std::vector<RWGFun>::iterator rwgM = rwgFuns->begin();
390 rwgM != rwgFuns->end(); rwgM++) {
391 for (std::vector<IncidentField *>::iterator incIter = incFields->begin();
392 incIter != incFields->end(); incIter++) {
393 int m(rwgM->EdgeIndex());
394 if (grnFunLayered == nullptr) { // Homogeneous medium
395 dcmplx temp;
396 temp = (*incIter)->IntegrateE(&(*rwgM));
397#ifdef DEBUG
398 std::cout << "δ (" << m << ")=" << temp << "\n";
399#endif
400 (*lseVector)(m) += temp;
401
402 temp = (*incIter)->IntegrateH(&(*rwgM));
403#ifdef DEBUG
404 std::cout << "κ (" << m << ")=" << temp << "\n";
405#endif
406 (*lseVector)(m + mxOffset) -= temp;
407 } else { // Layered medium
408 std::vector<dcmplx> temp;
409 temp = (*incIter)->IntegrateLayeredEandH(&(*rwgM));
410#ifdef DEBUG
411 std::cout << "δ (" << m << ")=" << temp[0] << "\n";
412#endif
413 (*lseVector)(m) += temp[0];
414#ifdef DEBUG
415 std::cout << "κ (" << m << ")=" << temp[1] << "\n";
416#endif
417 (*lseVector)(m + mxOffset) -= temp[1];
418 }
419 }
420#ifdef DEBUG
421 std::cout << "\n";
422#endif
423 }
424 return 0;
425}
426
427// ---------------- Layer indexing (utility) ----------------
435int SIEFormPMCHW::GetLayerIndex(rvec pos) const {
436 double z = pos[2]; // Extract the z-component of the position
437 int index = -1;
438 const double eps = 1e-6; // Small tolerance for floating-point comparisons
439
440 // Check if point is on an interface
441 for (size_t i = 0; i < zValsInterfaces.size(); ++i) {
442 if (std::abs(z - zValsInterfaces[i]) <= eps) {
443 // Interface i separates layer i and layer i+1
444 int l_lower = i;
445 int l_upper = i + 1;
446 index = std::abs(l_lower - midLayerIndex) < std::abs(l_upper - midLayerIndex)
447 ? l_lower : l_upper; break;
448 }
449 }
450
451 for (size_t i = 0; i < zValsInterfaces.size() - 1; ++i) {
452 if (z > zValsInterfaces[i] + eps && z < zValsInterfaces[i + 1] - eps) {
453 index = i + 1; break;
454 }
455 }
456
457 // If z is beyond the last interface, return the index of the last layer
458 if (z > zValsInterfaces.back() + eps) {
459 index = zValsInterfaces.size();
460 }
461
462 // If z is below the first interface, return the index of the first layer
463 if (z < zValsInterfaces.front() - eps) {
464 index = 0;
465 }
466
467 return index;
468}
469
470// ---------------- Threading control ----------------
471int SIEFormPMCHW::threads = 1;
472
473// Set the number of worker threads used in parallel assembly.
474void SIEFormPMCHW::AssignThreads(int t) { threads = t; }

SIEFormPMCHW::FillLSEMatrixParallel

SIEForm::SIEForm
SIEForm(std::vector< RWGFun > *inRWGFuns, GreenF *inGrnFun, std::vector< IncidentField * > *inIncFields, dcmplx inVacWavelength)
Construct the SIE formulation context.

dcmplx omega
